descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione del Lavoro La posizione di Analista del Rischio Operativo si colloca all’interno della funzione di Rischio Operativo e si concentra sul rafforzamento del framework di gestione del rischio e di controllo interno della banca a livello globale. Agendo come partner chiave di rischio per la prima linea di difesa, la posizione fornisce sfide e supervisione indipendenti sui rischi operativi, garantendo che processi, sistemi e attività siano gestiti in linea con l’appetito al rischio della banca. Main responsibilities
- Supervisionare l’implementazione efficace e coerente e la manutenzione del framework di gestione del rischio e dei controlli a livello globale;
- Contribuire a valutazioni tematiche di rischio e controllo su una vasta gamma di questioni, inclusi back e middle-office, fondi, titoli, pagamenti, azioni societarie e esecuzione degli ordini attraverso la collaborazione con altri stakeholder;
- Eseguire walkthrough dei processi e test di controllo a livello di processo per consentire l’identificazione e la valutazione dei rischi e dei controlli.
- Escalation proattiva e comunicazione efficace delle debolezze di controllo materiali, collaborazione stretta con i principali stakeholder nelle funzioni rilevanti per definire piani d’azione appropriati e supervisionarne l’implementazione tempestiva.
- Fornire competenze e raccomandazioni per miglioramenti al fine di garantire l’adesione alle normative interne, ai requisiti normativi e alle migliori pratiche del settore. Skills and experience
- Laurea magistrale in Economia, Amministrazione Aziendale o campo tecnico (Scienze, Tecnologia, Ingegneria, Matematica).
- Almeno 5-7 anni di esperienza nel settore bancario (idealmente in Controllo del Rischio, Audit o Gestione del Rischio Aziendale), o in consulenza/audit presso una società di servizi professionali leader; una combinazione di entrambe è considerata un vantaggio.
- Solida comprensione dei processi e sistemi bancari, prodotti e requisiti normativi correlati. Competenza con sistemi bancari core e sistemi front-end è un plus.
- Eccellenti capacità comunicative in inglese, sia verbali che scritte. La conoscenza del tedesco, francese o italiano è un vantaggio.
- Capacità comprovata di redigere report e comunicare efficacemente con un pubblico senior.
- Motivazione autonoma, diligenza, elevata organizzazione, capacità di priorizzare e gestire più attività, e capacità di prosperare in un ambiente dinamico.
- Eccellenti capacità analitiche e di problem solving, capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo e come parte di un team globale.
- Mentalità innovativa, con capacità di individuare opportunità di miglioramento dei processi e di efficienza operativa. Our Values Accountability : Assumersi la responsabilità di compiti e sfide, e cercare il miglioramento continuo Hands-on : Essere proattivi per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità Passionate : Essere impegnati e puntare all’eccellenza Solution-driven : Focalizzarsi sui risultati del cliente e trattare i clienti in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio Partnership-oriented : Promuovere collaborazione e lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Stellenbeschreibung Die Position des Operational Risk Analyst befindet sich innerhalb der Funktion des operationellen Risikos und konzentriert sich auf die Stärkung des Risikomanagement- und internen Kontrollrahmens der Bank weltweit. Als wichtiger Risikopartner für die erste Verteidigungslinie bietet die Position unabhängige Herausforderungen und Überwachung der operationellen Risiken, um sicherzustellen, dass Prozesse, Systeme und Aktivitäten im Einklang mit der Risikobereitschaft der Bank verwaltet werden. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten
- Überwachung der effektiven und konsistenten Umsetzung sowie Wartung des Risiko- und Kontrollmanagement-Frameworks weltweit;
- Beitrag zu thematischen Risiko- und Kontrollbewertungen zu einer Vielzahl von Themen, einschließlich Back- und Middle-Office, Fonds, Wertpapiere, Zahlungen, Corporate Actions und Order-Ausführung in Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Stakeholdern;
- Durchführung von Prozessdurchläufen und Kontrolltests zur Identifikation und Bewertung von Risiken und Kontrollen.
- Proaktive Eskalation und effektive Kommunikation wesentlicher Kontrollschwächen, enge Zusammenarbeit mit Schlüsselakteuren in den relevanten Funktionen zur Definition geeigneter Maßnahmenpläne und Überwachung ihrer rechtzeitigen Umsetzung.
- Fachliche Expertise bereitstellen und Empfehlungen für Verbesserungen geben, um die Einhaltung interner Vorschriften, regulatorischer Anforderungen und Branchenbest Practices sicherzustellen. Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung
- Master-Abschluss in Betriebswirtschaft, Wirtschaft oder einem technischen Fachgebiet (Wissenschaft, Technologie, Ingenieurwesen, Mathematik).
- Mindestens 5 bis 7 Jahre Erfahrung im Bankensektor (idealerweise im Risikokontroll-, Audit- oder Business-Risk-Management), oder in Beratung/Audit bei einer führenden professionellen Dienstleistungsfirma; eine Kombination aus beidem gilt als Vorteil.
- Fundiertes Verständnis von Bankprozessen und -systemen, Produkten und den damit verbundenen regulatorischen Anforderungen. Erfahrung mit Kernbankensystemen und Front-Systemen ist ein Plus.
- Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch, sowohl mündlich als auch schriftlich. Kenntnisse in Deutsch, Französisch oder Italienisch sind von Vorteil.
- Nachweisliche Fähigkeit, Berichte zu verfassen und effektiv mit einer Führungsebene zu kommunizieren.
- Selbstmotivation, Sorgfalt, hohe Organisation, Priorisierung und Multitasking-Fähigkeiten sowie die Fähigkeit, in einem schnelllebigen Umfeld zu gedeihen.
- Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten und Problemlösungskompetenz, Fähigkeit, eigenständig und im globalen Team zu arbeiten.
- Innovatives Denken, mit der Fähigkeit, Chancen zur Prozessverbesserung und operativen Effizienz zu erkennen. Unsere Werte Verantwortung : Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung anstreben Praktisch : Proaktiv sein, um schnell hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern Leidenschaftlich : Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben Lösungsorientiert : Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung der Kunden mit einer risiko-bewussten Denkweise Partnerschaftlich : Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit fördern. Gemeinsam mit unternehmerischem Geist arbeiten.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description du Poste Le poste d’Analyste Risque Opérationnel se situe au sein de la fonction Risque Opérationnel et vise à renforcer le cadre de gestion des risques et de contrôle interne de la banque à l’échelle mondiale. Agissant en tant que partenaire clé du premier niveau de défense, le poste fournit un défi et une supervision indépendants sur les risques opérationnels, en veillant à ce que les processus, systèmes et activités soient gérés conformément à l’appétit pour le risque de la banque. Principales responsabilités
- Superviser la mise en œuvre efficace et cohérente ainsi que la maintenance du cadre de gestion des risques et de contrôle à l’échelle mondiale ;
- Contribuer aux évaluations thématiques des risques et contrôles sur un large éventail de sujets, y compris le back-office, le middle-office, les fonds, les titres, les paiements, les actions corporatives et l’exécution des ordres, en collaboration avec d’autres parties prenantes ;
- Réaliser des walkthroughs de processus et des tests de contrôle pour permettre l’identification et l’évaluation des risques et contrôles.
- Escalader de manière proactive et communiquer efficacement les faiblesses de contrôle importantes, collaborer étroitement avec les principales parties prenantes dans les fonctions concernées pour définir des plans d’action appropriés, et superviser leur mise en œuvre en temps voulu.
- Fournir une expertise et faire des recommandations pour des améliorations afin d’assurer le respect des réglementations internes, des exigences réglementaires et des meilleures pratiques du secteur. Compétences et expérience
- Diplôme de Master en Administration des Affaires, Économie ou dans un domaine technique (Sciences, Technologie, Ingénierie, Mathématiques).
- Au moins 5 à 7 ans d’expérience dans le secteur bancaire (idéalement en Contrôle des Risques, Audit ou Gestion des Risques d’Entreprise), ou en conseil/audit auprès d’un cabinet de services professionnels de premier plan ; une combinaison des deux est un avantage.
- Bonne compréhension des processus et systèmes bancaires, des produits et des exigences réglementaires associées. Une expertise avec les systèmes bancaires de base et les systèmes front est un plus.
- Excellentes compétences en communication en anglais, à l’oral comme à l’écrit. La connaissance de l’allemand, du français ou de l’italien est un atout.
- Capacité avérée à rédiger des rapports et à communiquer efficacement avec un public de haut niveau.
- Autonomie, diligence, organisation rigoureuse, capacité à prioriser et à gérer plusieurs tâches, et à prospérer dans un environnement dynamique.
- Excellentes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes, capacité à travailler de manière autonome et en équipe mondiale.
- Esprit innovant, avec la capacité d’identifier des opportunités d’amélioration des processus et d’efficacité opérationnelle. Nos Valeurs Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et défis, tout en recherchant une amélioration continue Pratique : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité Passionné : Être engagé et viser l’excellence Orienté solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats pour le client et traiter les clients équitablement avec une mentalité consciente du risque Partenariat : Favoriser la collaboration et le travail d’équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

jobs.title: Senior Private Markets Product Specialist
jobs.description:
General Info

- Department: Private Markets

- Work time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Zurich (or Lugano)

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

To strengthen our growing private markets franchise, we are looking for a Swiss based (Senior) Private Markets Product Specialist.

We are searching for a candidate who shares our enthusiasm for delivering a first-class client experience through an engaging and proactive relationship approach. This is an excellent opportunity to join a growing, seasoned and entrepreneurial global team with strong personal and professional development opportunities.

Tasks and Responsibilities

- Accountable for driving a strategic and hands-on distribution effort across our private markets solutions, focusing on EFG’s in-house private markets program and product suite of perpetual/evergreen funds

- Strategic partner to Client Relationship Officers (CROs), Investment Counsellors (ICs) and their clients to increase overall allocations to the asset class

- Responsible for impactful and tailor-made marketing content for in-person and written presentations, both internally and for our global client base

- Foster the ongoing development of our private markets franchise by identifying client demands and trends to shape our future product offering

- Design educational initiatives to drive asset class-specific learning excellence and impact across various stakeholder groups within EFG

Requirements and Qualifications

- 5+ years working experience in distribution and/or sales within the private markets (including real estate) industry, preferably focused on private wealth clients

- For senior-level role: 10+ years of relevant working experience required

- Ambitious and self-motivation personality with the ability to work in a target driven high-performance culture while maintaining “down-to-earth” attitude

- Entrepreneurial mindset with an enthusiastic, flexible and hands-on approach

- Excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skills, with proficiency in English and Italien (German beneficial)

- Master’s degree in Finance or similar and further professional qualifications (CFA, CAIA, etc.)

- Advanced proficiency in PowerPoint and Excel, with the ability to create impactful client-facing marketing material

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni generali

- Dipartimento: Mercato privato

- Tempo di lavoro Percentuale: 100%

- Posizione: Zurigo (o Lugano)

La nostra azienda

EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale, che offre servizi di private banking e asset management. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si sforza di essere un datore di lavoro di scelta.

Il nostro scopo e missione

Incoraggiare le menti imprenditoriali a creare valore – oggi e per il futuro.

Descrizione del lavoro

Per rafforzare il nostro crescente franchising dei mercati privati, stiamo cercando uno specialista svizzero (Senior) dei mercati privati.

Stiamo cercando un candidato che condivide il nostro entusiasmo per offrire un'esperienza cliente di prima classe attraverso un approccio di relazione coinvolgente e proattivo. Questa è un'ottima opportunità per unirsi a un team globale crescente, esperto e imprenditoriale con forti opportunità di sviluppo personale e professionale.

Compiti e responsabilità

- Contabile per guidare uno sforzo strategico e pratico di distribuzione attraverso le nostre soluzioni di mercato privato, concentrandosi sul programma di mercati privati interni di EFG e sulla suite di prodotti di fondi perpetui/verdi

- Partner strategico per i responsabili delle relazioni con i clienti (CRO), i consulenti per gli investimenti (IC) e i loro clienti per aumentare le allocazioni globali alla classe di asset

- Responsabile per contenuti di marketing su misura e di impatto per presentazioni in-persona e scritte, sia internamente che per la nostra base clienti globale

- Promuovere lo sviluppo continuo del nostro franchise dei mercati privati identificando le esigenze e le tendenze del cliente per modellare la nostra futura offerta di prodotti

- Progettare iniziative educative per guidare l'eccellenza e l'impatto dell'apprendimento specifico di asset su vari gruppi di stakeholder all'interno di EFG

Requisiti e qualifiche

- 5+ anni di esperienza lavorativa nella distribuzione e/o vendita all'interno dell'industria dei mercati privati (compreso il settore immobiliare), preferibilmente focalizzata sui clienti della ricchezza privata

- Per il ruolo di alto livello: 10+ anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante richiesto

- personalità ambiziosa e automotivazione con la capacità di lavorare in una cultura mirata ad alte prestazioni pur mantenendo l'atteggiamento “down-to-earth”

- Mindset imprenditoriale con un approccio entusiasta, flessibile e pratico

- Ottima comunicazione, presentazione e competenze interpersonali, con competenza in inglese e in italiano (tedesco benefico)

- Laurea magistrale in finanza o qualifiche professionali simili e successive (CFA, CAIA, ecc.)

- Proficienza avanzata in PowerPoint ed Excel, con la capacità di creare materiale di marketing orientato al cliente

I nostri valori

- Responsabilità: Prendere la proprietà per i compiti e le sfide, nonché cercare un miglioramento continuo

- Hands-on: essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità

descriptionByLocale.de:
Allgemeine Info

- Abteilung: Privatmärkte

- Arbeitszeit Prozentsatz: 100%

- Standort: Zürich (oder Lugano)

Unsere Firma

EFG International ist eine globale Privatbankengruppe, die private Bank- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir bedienen Kunden in über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet ein stimulierendes und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld und ist bestrebt, Arbeitgeber der Wahl zu sein.

Unsere Aufgabe und Mission

Unternehmergeist zu stärken, um Mehrwert zu schaffen – heute und für die Zukunft.

Job Description

Um unsere wachsenden privaten Märkte Franchise zu stärken, suchen wir einen Swiss Based (Senior) Private Markets Product Specialist.

Wir suchen einen Kandidat, der unseren Enthusiasmus teilt, eine erstklassige Klientenerfahrung durch einen ansprechenden und proaktiven Beziehungsansatz zu liefern. Dies ist eine ausgezeichnete Gelegenheit, sich einem wachsenden, gewürzten und unternehmerischen globalen Team mit starken persönlichen und beruflichen Entwicklungschancen anzuschließen.

Aufgaben und Verantwortungen

- Berechnungsfähig für den Einsatz strategischer und handhabender Vertriebsanstrengungen auf unseren privaten Märkten Lösungen, die sich auf das eigene private Marktprogramm der EFG und die Produktsuite von perpetual/evergreen Fonds konzentrieren

- Strategischer Partner für Client Relationship Officers (CROs), Investment Counsellors (ICs) und ihre Kunden, um die Gesamtzuweisungen an die Assetklasse zu erhöhen

- Verantwortlich für wirkungsstarke und maßgeschneiderte Marketinginhalte für persönliche und schriftliche Präsentationen, sowohl intern als auch für unsere globale Kundenbasis

- Foster die kontinuierliche Entwicklung unserer privaten Märkte Franchise durch die Identifizierung von Kundenanforderungen und Trends, um unser zukünftiges Produktangebot zu gestalten

- Entwerfen Sie Bildungsinitiativen, um vermögensklassenspezifische Lernqualität und Auswirkungen auf verschiedene Stakeholder-Gruppen innerhalb der EFG zu fördern

Anforderungen und Qualifikationen

- 5+ Jahre Berufserfahrung im Vertrieb und/oder Vertrieb in der Privatwirtschaft (einschließlich Immobilien) konzentrierte sich vorzugsweise auf Privatvermögenskunden

- Für Senioren-Rolle: 10+ Jahre relevante Arbeitserfahrung erforderlich

- Ambitiöse und selbstmotivierende Persönlichkeit mit der Fähigkeit, in einer zielorientierten Hochleistungskultur zu arbeiten, während die Haltung von „down-to-earth“ beibehalten wird

- Entrepreneurial Mindset mit einem enthusiastischen, flexiblen und praktischen Ansatz

- Ausgezeichnete Kommunikation, Präsentation und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten, mit Sprachkenntnissen in Englisch und Italien

- Masterstudiengang Finanzen oder ähnliche und weitere berufliche Qualifikationen (CFA, CAIA, etc.)

- Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse in PowerPoint und Excel, mit der Fähigkeit, schlagzähes Marketingmaterial zu erstellen

Unsere Werte

- Rechenschaftspflicht: Eigentumsbesitz für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung

- Hands-on: Als proaktiv, schnell qualitativ hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern

- Leidenschaftlich: Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz

- Lösungsgetrieben: Konzentrieren Sie sich auf Client-Ergebnisse und Behandlung von Clients ziemlich mit einem risikobewussten Mindset

- Partnerschaftsorientiert: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Gemeinsam mit einem Unternehmergeist.

Bitte stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie beim Ausfüllen der Bewerbung einen Brief an Ihren Lebenslauf anbringen.

Anwendung

Wenn Sie sich für diese Position bewerben möchten, verwenden Sie diesen Link.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Informations générales

- Département: Marchés privés

- Temps de travail Pourcentage: 100%

- Lieu: Zurich (ou Lugano)

Notre société

EFG International est un groupe mondial de banques privées qui offre des services de banque privée et de gestion d'actifs. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 endroits dans le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix.

Notre but et notre mission

Autoriser les esprits entrepreneurs à créer de la valeur – aujourd'hui et pour l'avenir.

Description de l'emploi

Pour renforcer notre franchise croissante sur les marchés privés, nous recherchons un spécialiste des produits des marchés privés basé en Suisse.

Nous sommes à la recherche d'un candidat qui partage notre enthousiasme pour offrir une expérience client de première classe grâce à une approche de relation engageante et proactive. C'est une excellente occasion de se joindre à une équipe mondiale en pleine croissance, expérimentée et entrepreneuriale avec de fortes possibilités de développement personnel et professionnel.

Tâches et responsabilités

- Responsable d'un effort stratégique et pratique de distribution dans nos solutions de marchés privés, en mettant l'accent sur le programme EFG en interne des marchés privés et une série de produits de fonds perpétuels/evergreen

- Partenaire stratégique des agents de relations avec la clientèle (ORC), des conseillers en investissement (IC) et de leurs clients pour augmenter les affectations globales à la catégorie d'actifs

- Responsable du contenu marketing impacté et sur-mesure pour les présentations en personne et écrites, à la fois en interne et pour notre clientèle mondiale

- Favoriser le développement continu de notre franchise des marchés privés en identifiant les demandes et tendances des clients pour façonner notre offre de produits

- Concevoir des initiatives éducatives pour stimuler l'excellence et l'impact de l'apprentissage par classe d'actifs dans divers groupes d'intervenants au sein de l'EFG

Exigences et qualifications

- 5 ans et plus d'expérience dans le domaine de la distribution et/ou des ventes dans l'industrie privée (y compris l'immobilier), de préférence axée sur les clients à fortune privée

- Pour le rôle de haut niveau: 10 ans et plus d'expérience professionnelle pertinente

- Personnalité ambitieuse et automotivante avec la capacité de travailler dans une culture de haute performance axée sur la cible tout en maintenant l'attitude de bas-à-terre

- L'esprit d'entreprise avec une approche enthousiaste, flexible et pratique

- Excellente communication, présentation et aptitudes interpersonnelles, avec maîtrise de l'anglais et de l'italien (bénéfice allemand)

- Maîtrise en finance ou autres qualifications professionnelles (CFA, CAIA, etc.)

- Compétence avancée en PowerPoint et Excel, avec la capacité de créer du matériel marketing impacté face à la clientèle

Nos valeurs

- Responsabilité : prise en charge des tâches et des défis, et recherche d'amélioration continue

- Hands-on: être proactif pour obtenir rapidement des résultats de haute qualité

- Passionné : être engagé et chercher l'excellence

- Une solution axée sur les résultats des clients et un traitement équitable des clients avec une prise de conscience du risque

- Objectif partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit d'entreprise.

Veuillez joindre une lettre d'accompagnement à votre CV au moment de remplir la demande.

Demande

Si vous souhaitez postuler à ce poste, utilisez ce lien pour postuler.

summary:
General Info

  • Department: Private Markets
  • Work time Percentage: 100%
  • Location: Zurich (or Lugano)

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

To strengthen our growing private markets franchise, we are looking for a Swiss based (Senior) Private Markets Product Specialist.

We are searching for a candidate who shares our enthusiasm for delivering a first-class client experience through an engaging and proactive relationship approach. This is an excellent opportunity to join a growing, seasoned and entrepreneurial global team with strong personal and professional development opportunities.

Tasks and Responsibilities

  • Accountable for driving a strategic and hands-on distribution effort across our private markets solutions, focusing on EFG’s in-house private markets program and product suite of perpetual/evergreen funds
  • Strategic partner to Client Relationship Officers (CROs), Investment Counsellors (ICs) and their clients to increase overall allocations to the asset class
  • Responsible for impactful and tailor-made marketing content for in-person and written presentations, both internally and for our global client base
  • Foster the ongoing development of our private markets franchise by identifying client demands and trends to shape our future product offering
  • Design educational initiatives to drive asset class-specific learning excellence and impact across various stakeholder groups within EFG

Requirements and Qualifications

  • 5+ years working experience in distribution and/or sales within the private markets (including real estate) industry, preferably focused on private wealth clients
  • For senior-level role: 10+ years of relevant working experience required
  • Ambitious and self-motivation personality with the ability to work in a target driven high-performance culture while maintaining “down-to-earth” attitude
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with an enthusiastic, flexible and hands-on approach
  • Excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skills, with proficiency in English and Italien (German beneficial)
  • Master’s degree in Finance or similar and further professional qualifications (CFA, CAIA, etc.)
  • Advanced proficiency in PowerPoint and Excel, with the ability to create impactful client-facing marketing material

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement
  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results
  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence
  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset
  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

jobs.title: EPM OneStream Developer/Business Data Analyst
jobs.description:
Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

The EPM OneStream Developer/Business Data Analyst will be part of the Group Performance Measurement, Budgeting & Reporting Team in Lugano and will contribute to develop and run an integrated planning, reporting and performance review process to facilitate value-driven business decision-making. In his role as EPM OneStream Developer, the resource will oversee running, maintenance and development of our existing OneStream planning platform. In his role as EPM OneStream Developer/Business Data Analyst, the resource will support the performance measurement activities by running granular analysis of financial performance root causes and by providing insights on value creation levers.

The resource will play an active role supporting business development and providing value-added decision support using data modelling and forecasting intelligence.

Main Responsibilities

- EPM OneStream Developer

- Business analyst and power user of MI data

- Design and maintain data models for analysis and forecasting

- Establish and compile dashboards and presentations to senior management

- Take active role in the business performance dialogues

- Active collaboration with Strategy & Corporate Development unit during budgeting and forecasting process

- Design and develop MI reports and simulations with data from the various MIS systems of the bank to provide insight on value creation levers to the business

- Develop strong relationship with business management and business controllers to support the Planning & Controlling business partnership

Skills and experience

- Professional experience in EPM Business Intelligence in Financial Industry

- OneStream software: EPM applications maintenance and developments expert

- Ability to understand large datasets and experience of data modelling, providing accurate data analysis

- Power user of OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel and PowerPoint; Knowledge of Excel Macros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide to automate data extraction and reporting

- Quick learner, accurate and efficient

- Proactive attitude and willingness to take on new knowledge and skills

- Ability to work under pressure and adapt to unforeseen work demands

- Good communication skills to communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels

- Fluent in Italian and English

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

descriptionByLocale.it:
La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale che offre servizi di private banking e gestione patrimoniale. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. La nostra missione e scopo Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Descrizione del lavoro Il Sviluppatore EPM OneStream/Analista Dati Business sarà parte del team di Misurazione delle Prestazioni, Budgeting e Reporting del Gruppo a Lugano e contribuirà a sviluppare e gestire un processo integrato di pianificazione, reporting e revisione delle prestazioni per facilitare decisioni aziendali guidate dal valore. Nel suo ruolo di Sviluppatore EPM OneStream, la risorsa sarà responsabile della gestione, manutenzione e sviluppo della nostra piattaforma di pianificazione OneStream esistente. Nel suo ruolo di Sviluppatore EPM OneStream/Analista Dati Business, la risorsa sosterrà le attività di misurazione delle prestazioni eseguendo analisi granulari delle cause profonde della performance finanziaria e fornendo informazioni approfondite sugli elementi che creano valore. La risorsa giocherà un ruolo attivo nel sostenere lo sviluppo aziendale e fornire supporto decisionale di valore aggiunto utilizzando la modellazione dei dati e l'intelligenza previsionale. Responsabilità principali
- Sviluppatore EPM OneStream
- Analista aziendale e utente avanzato dei dati MI
- Progettare e mantenere modelli di dati per l'analisi e la previsione
- Creare e compilare dashboard e presentazioni per la gestione senior
- Partecipare attivamente ai dialoghi sulla performance aziendale
- Collaborazione attiva con l'unità di Strategia e Sviluppo Aziendale durante il processo di budgeting e previsione
- Progettare e sviluppare report MI e simulazioni con dati provenienti dai vari sistemi MIS della banca per fornire informazioni approfondite sugli elementi che creano valore per l'azienda
- Sviluppare una forte relazione con la gestione aziendale e i responsabili della pianificazione e del controllo per sostenere la partnership aziendale Pianificazione e Controllo Abilità ed esperienza
- Esperienza professionale nell'ambito dell'intelligenza aziendale EPM nel settore finanziario
- Software OneStream: esperto in manutenzione e sviluppo di applicazioni EPM
- Capacità di comprendere grandi dataset ed esperienza nella modellazione dei dati, fornendo analisi accurate dei dati
- Utente avanzato di OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel e PowerPoint; Conoscenza di Excel Macros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide per automatizzare l'estrazione e la segnalazione dei dati
- Velocità di apprendimento, accuratezza ed efficienza
- Atteggiamento proattivo e disponibilità a imparare nuove conoscenze e competenze
- Capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e adattarsi a richieste di lavoro impreviste
- Buone capacità di comunicazione per comunicare efficacemente con le parti interessate a tutti i livelli
- Fluente in italiano e inglese I nostri valori
- Accountability: Assunzione della proprietà di compiti e sfide, nonché ricerca del miglioramento continuo
- Hands-on: Essere proattivi per fornire risultati di alta qualità rapidamente
- Passionate: Essere impegnati e impegnarsi per l'eccellenza
- Solution-driven: Focalizzazione sui risultati dei clienti e trattamento dei clienti in modo equo con un atteggiamento consapevole del rischio
- Partnership-oriented: Promozione della collaborazione e del lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.

Unser Unternehmen EFG International ist eine globale Private-Banking-Gruppe, die private Banking- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. In seiner Rolle als EPM OneStream-Entwickler/Business Data Analyst wird die Ressource die Leistungsmessungsaktivitäten unterstützen, indem sie granulare Analysen der finanziellen Leistungsursachen durchführt und Einblicke in die Wertschöpfungshebel liefert. Die Ressource wird eine aktive Rolle bei der Unterstützung der Geschäftsentwicklung und der Bereitstellung von wertaddierendem Entscheidungssupport unter Verwendung von Datenmodellierung und Prognoseintelligenz spielen. Hauptverantwortungen
- EPM OneStream-Entwickler
- Business-Analyst und Power-User von MI-Daten
- Entwerfen und Warten von Datenmodellen für Analyse und Prognose
- Erstellen und Zusammenstellen von Dashboards und Präsentationen für das Senior-Management
- Aktive Teilnahme an den Business-Performance-Dialogen
- Aktive Zusammenarbeit mit der Strategie- und Unternehmensentwicklungseinheit während des Budgetierungs- und Prognoseprozesses
- Entwerfen und Entwickeln von MI-Berichten und -Simulationen mit Daten aus den verschiedenen MIS-Systemen der Bank, um Einblicke in die Wertschöpfungshebel für das Geschäft zu liefern
- Aufbau einer starken Beziehung zu den Geschäftsführern und den Planungs- und Controlling-Verantwortlichen, um die Geschäftsbeziehung zwischen Planung und Controlling zu unterstützen Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen
- Berufserfahrung im Bereich EPM Business Intelligence in der Finanzindustrie
- OneStream-Software: Experte für Wartung und Entwicklung von EPM-Anwendungen
- Fähigkeit, große Datenmengen zu verstehen und Erfahrung in der Datenmodellierung, um genaue Datenanalysen bereitzustellen
- Power-User von OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel und PowerPoint; Kenntnisse von Excel-Makros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide zur Automatisierung der Datenextraktion und -berichterstattung
- Schnelle Lerner, Genauigkeit und Effizienz
- Proaktive Einstellung und Bereitschaft, neue Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten zu erwerben
- Fähigkeit, unter Druck zu arbeiten und sich an unvorhergesehene Arbeitsanforderungen anzupassen
- Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, um effektiv mit Stakeholdern auf allen Ebenen zu kommunizieren
- Fließend in Italienisch und Englisch Unsere Werte
- Accountability: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung
- Hands-on: Proaktiv sein, um Ergebnisse von hoher Qualität schnell zu liefern
- Passionate: Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz
- Solution-driven: Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Mindset
- Partnership-oriented: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

The EPM OneStream Developer/Business Data Analyst will be part of the Group Performance Measurement, Budgeting & Reporting Team in Lugano and will contribute to develop and run an integrated planning, reporting and performance review process to facilitate value-driven business decision-making. In his role as EPM OneStream Developer, the resource will oversee running, maintenance and development of our existing OneStream planning platform. In his role as EPM OneStream Developer/Business Data Analyst, the resource will support the performance measurement activities by running granular analysis of financial performance root causes and by providing insights on value creation levers.

The resource will play an active role supporting business development and providing value-added decision support using data modelling and forecasting intelligence.

Main Responsibilities

  • EPM OneStream Developer
  • Business analyst and power user of MI data
  • Design and maintain data models for analysis and forecasting
  • Establish and compile dashboards and presentations to senior management
  • Take active role in the business performance dialogues
  • Active collaboration with Strategy & Corporate Development unit during budgeting and forecasting process
  • Design and develop MI reports and simulations with data from the various MIS systems of the bank to provide insight on value creation levers to the business
  • Develop strong relationship with business management and business controllers to support the Planning & Controlling business partnership

Skills and experience

  • Professional experience in EPM Business Intelligence in Financial Industry
  • OneStream software: EPM applications maintenance and developments expert
  • Ability to understand large datasets and experience of data modelling, providing accurate data analysis
  • Power user of OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel and PowerPoint; Knowledge of Excel Macros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide to automate data extraction and reporting
  • Quick learner, accurate and efficient
  • Proactive attitude and willingness to take on new knowledge and skills
  • Ability to work under pressure and adapt to unforeseen work demands
  • Good communication skills to communicate effectively with stakeholders at all levels
  • Fluent in Italian and English

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement
  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results
  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence
  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset
  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

jobs.title: Network & Proxy Support Team Lead
jobs.description:
General Information

- Department: Information Technology – Infrastructure

- Work Time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Geneva

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

Role and Team

Within the Information Technology Department, you will join a team of 12 engineers based in Geneva and collaborate with IT colleagues in more than 30 countries. Under the supervision of the IT Infrastructure Support Manager, you will lead a team of three network engineers.

You will combine people management with hands-on engineering, ensuring that EFG’s business-critical systems remain secure, resilient, and always connected in a demanding private banking environment.

Main Responsibilities

1. Leadership & Management

- Lead, coach and develop a team of three network engineers, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration and continuous improvement.

- Combine team leadership with hands-on technical work on complex incidents and projects.

- Oversee day-to-day network and proxy operations, including incident, problem and change management.

- Plan and coordinate network and proxy upgrades, migrations and lifecycle activities in alignment with business and security requirements.

- Manage escalations, ensuring timely resolution of major incidents and clear communication with stakeholders.

- Manage and review third-party providers and vendor contracts, ensuring service quality, cost effectiveness and adherence to SLAs.

- Ensure compliance with internal policies as well as regulatory, security and audit requirements relevant to network and security infrastructure.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

- Collaborate closely with security teams to define, implement and maintain security policies, including URL filtering, cloud application and file filtering, DLP and access control.

- Configure, operate and maintain Zscaler solutions (ZIA, ZPA) and related components such as SIPA, cloud firewall, PAC files, NSS, ZCC...

- Manage corporate devices using Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), ensuring secure and reliable connectivity.

- Troubleshoot and resolve Zscaler-related issues by analysing logs, performing traces and applying appropriate corrective actions.

- Analyse network packet traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers to identify and resolve complex connectivity and performance issues.

- Proactively suggest and implement improvements to network and proxy performance, capacity, scalability and security posture.

3. Network Engineering & Operations

- Provide 2nd and 3rd level technical support for network and related services.

- Configure, install and maintain network devices and services (e.g. routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, VPN, QoS).

- Support and maintain network connectivity for financial market data feeds and other latency-sensitive services.

- Implement and maintain a continuous improvement process by defining, documenting and enforcing network and proxy standards, procedures and best practices.

- Interface with external suppliers and partners (integrators, telecom providers, market data vendors, etc.) to design, implement and support network solutions.

- Participate in 24x7 on-call / on-duty rotation (piquet) to support critical infrastructure.

- Monitor network and proxy performance, ensuring system availability, reliability and security.

- Monitor system resource utilisation, trends and capacity, and plan upgrades or optimisations accordingly.

Skills and Experience

Background

- 6–10 years of experience in networking in complex, international environments.

- Strong knowledge of enterprise networking architecture and network security.

- Professional experience with Cisco technologies and Cisco ACI; financial services experience is a plus.

Technical Skills

- Expert in LAN/WAN/MAN implementation and troubleshooting.

- Strong experience with firewalls (Fortinet and/or Check Point), VPN, IPSec and GRE tunnels.

- Proven expertise with Zscaler ZIA/ZPA and ZCC on corporate devices.

- Solid understanding of network and cloud connectivity design.

- Ability to analyse network traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers.

- Knowledge of Python or another scripting language for automation; Zscaler certification is a plus.

Soft Skills & Languages

- Strong communication skills; able to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

- Experience managing third-party providers and internal support teams.

- Rigorous, autonomous, proactive and service-oriented, with strong documentation skills.

- Fluent in French and English, written and spoken.

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Application

- Please ensure you attach a cover letter to your CV when submitting your application.

- Should you wish to apply for this position, please use the designated application link.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni generali

- Dipartimento: Information Technology – Infrastructure

- Tempo di lavoro Percentuale: 100%

- Posizione: Ginevra

La nostra azienda

EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale, che offre servizi di private banking e asset management. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si sforza di essere un datore di lavoro di scelta.

Il nostro scopo e missione

Incoraggiare le menti imprenditoriali a creare valore – oggi e per il futuro.

Descrizione del lavoro

Ruolo e Team

All'interno del Dipartimento Informatica, si unirà a un team di 12 ingegneri con sede a Ginevra e collaborare con i colleghi IT in più di 30 paesi. Sotto la supervisione di IT Infrastructure Support Manager, guiderai un team di tre ingegneri di rete.

Combinate la gestione delle persone con l'ingegneria pratica, assicurando che i sistemi business-critical di EFG rimangano sicuri, resilienti e sempre connessi in un ambiente di private banking esigente.

Principali responsabilità

1. Leadership & Management

- Lead, coach e sviluppare un team di tre ingegneri di rete, promuovendo una cultura di responsabilità, collaborazione e miglioramento continuo.

- Combina la leadership del team con il lavoro tecnico pratico su incidenti complessi e progetti.

- Controllare le operazioni quotidiane di rete e proxy, tra cui la gestione di incidenti, problemi e cambiamenti.

- Pianificare e coordinare gli aggiornamenti di rete e proxy, le migrazioni e le attività del ciclo di vita in linea con i requisiti di business e sicurezza.

- Gestire le escalation, garantire una risoluzione tempestiva dei principali incidenti e una comunicazione chiara con gli stakeholder.

- Gestione e revisione di fornitori di terze parti e contratti di fornitori, garantendo qualità del servizio, efficacia dei costi e adesione a SLAs.

- Assicurare la conformità alle politiche interne e ai requisiti normativi, di sicurezza e di audit relativi alle infrastrutture di rete e di sicurezza.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

- Collabora a stretto contatto con i team di sicurezza per definire, implementare e mantenere le politiche di sicurezza, tra cui il filtraggio URL, l'applicazione cloud e il filtraggio dei file, DLP e il controllo degli accessi.

- Configurare, utilizzare e mantenere le soluzioni Zscaler (ZIA, ZPA) e componenti correlati come SIPA, cloud firewall, file PAC, NSS, ZCC...

- Gestire i dispositivi aziendali utilizzando Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), garantendo una connettività sicura e affidabile.

- Risoluzione dei problemi e risoluzione dei problemi relativi a Zscaler tramite l'analisi dei registri, l'esecuzione delle tracce e l'applicazione di azioni correttive appropriate.

- Analizzare le tracce dei pacchetti di rete (PCAP), i registri Fiddler e le intestazioni HTTP/HTTPS per identificare e risolvere problemi di connettività e prestazioni complessi.

- Proattivamente suggeriscono e implementano miglioramenti alle prestazioni di rete e proxy, capacità, scalabilità e postura di sicurezza.

3. Ingegneria della rete e operazioni

- Fornire supporto tecnico di secondo e terzo livello per la rete e i servizi correlati.

- Configurare, installare e mantenere dispositivi e servizi di rete (ad esempio router, switch, firewall, bilanciatori di carico, VPN, QoS).

- Supporto e mantenimento della connettività di rete per i feed di dati del mercato finanziario e altri servizi sensibili alla latenza.

- Implementare e mantenere un processo di miglioramento continuo definendo, documentando e rafforzando gli standard di rete e proxy, le procedure e le migliori pratiche.

- Interfaccia con fornitori esterni e partner (integratori, fornitori di telecomunicazioni, fornitori di dati di mercato, ecc.) per progettare, implementare e supportare soluzioni di rete.

- Partecipare a 24x7 on-call / on-duty rotazione (piquet) per sostenere l'infrastruttura critica.

- Monitorare le prestazioni di rete e proxy, assicurando la disponibilità del sistema, l'affidabilità e la sicurezza.

- Monitorare l'utilizzo delle risorse di sistema, le tendenze e la capacità, e pianificare aggiornamenti o ottimizzazioni di conseguenza.

Competenze ed Esperienza

Contesto

- 6-10 anni di esperienza nel networking in ambienti complessi e internazionali.

- Forte conoscenza dell'architettura di rete aziendale e della sicurezza di rete.

- Esperienza professionale con tecnologie Cisco e Cisco ACI; l'esperienza dei servizi finanziari è un vantaggio.

Competenze tecniche

- Esperto in implementazione LAN/WAN/MAN e risoluzione dei problemi.

- Forte esperienza con i firewall (Fortinet e/o Check Point), VPN, IPSec e tunnel GRE.

- Provata esperienza con Zscaler ZIA/ZPA e ZCC sui dispositivi aziendali.

- Solida comprensione della rete e del design della connettività cloud.

- Possibilità di analizzare le tracce di rete (PCAP), i log Fiddler e le intestazioni HTTP/HTTPS.

- Conoscenza di Python o un altro linguaggio di scrittura per l'automazione; la certificazione Zscaler è un plus.

Soft Skills & Languages

- Forte capacità di comunicazione; in grado di lavorare efficacemente con gli stakeholder tecnici e non tecnici.

- Esperienza di gestione di fornitori di terze parti e team di supporto interno.

- Rigoroso, autonomo, proattivo e orientato al servizio, con forti capacità di documentazione.

- Fluente in francese e inglese, scritto e parlato.

I nostri valori

- Responsabilità: Prendere la proprietà per i compiti e le sfide, nonché cercare un miglioramento continuo.

- Hands-on: essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità.

- Passionato: Impegnarsi e lottare per l'eccellenza.

- Soluzione-driven: Focusing sui risultati del cliente e il trattamento dei clienti abbastanza con una mentalità di rischio-consapevole.

- Partnership-oriented: promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra; lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.

Applicazione

- Si prega di assicurarsi di allegare una lettera di copertura al CV durante la presentazione della domanda.

- In caso di richiesta per questa posizione, utilizzare il link di richiesta designato.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Allgemeine Informationen

- Abteilung: Informationstechnologie – Infrastruktur

- Arbeitszeit: 100%

- Standort: Genf

Unsere Firma

EFG International ist eine globale Privatbankengruppe, die private Bank- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir bedienen Kunden in über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet ein stimulierendes und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld und ist bestrebt, Arbeitgeber der Wahl zu sein.

Unsere Aufgabe und Mission

Unternehmergeist zu stärken, um Mehrwert zu schaffen – heute und für die Zukunft.

Job Description

Rolle und Team

Innerhalb der Abteilung Informationstechnologie werden Sie sich an einem Team von 12 Ingenieuren mit Sitz in Genf beteiligen und in über 30 Ländern mit IT-Kollegen zusammenarbeiten. Unter der Aufsicht des IT-Infrastruktur-Unterstützungsmanagers führen Sie ein Team von drei Netzwerkingenieuren.

Sie kombinieren das Personalmanagement mit der Hand-on-Engineering, um sicherzustellen, dass die geschäftskritischen Systeme der EFG sicher, widerstandsfähig und immer in einem anspruchsvollen privaten Bankenumfeld verbunden bleiben.

Hauptverantwortlichkeiten

1. Führung und Management

- Führen, Coach und entwickeln Sie ein Team von drei Netzwerk-Ingenieuren und fördern eine Kultur der Rechenschaftspflicht, Zusammenarbeit und kontinuierliche Verbesserung.

- Kombinieren Sie Teamführung mit praktischen technischen Arbeiten an komplexen Vorfällen und Projekten.

- Beaufsichtigen Sie tägliche Netzwerk- und Proxy-Operationen, einschließlich Vorfall, Problem- und Änderungsmanagement.

- Planen und koordinieren Sie Netzwerk- und Proxy-Upgrades, Migrations- und Lebenszyklusaktivitäten in Abstimmung mit den Geschäfts- und Sicherheitsanforderungen.

- Eskalationen verwalten, eine rechtzeitige Lösung großer Vorfälle und eine klare Kommunikation mit den Interessenvertretern gewährleisten.

- Verwalten und überprüfen Drittanbieter und Lieferantenverträge, Gewährleistung der Servicequalität, Kostenwirksamkeit und Einhaltung von SLAs.

- Gewährleistung der Einhaltung interner Richtlinien sowie regulatorischer, sicherheits- und sicherheitsrelevanter Anforderungen für die Netz- und Sicherheitsinfrastruktur.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

- Mit Sicherheitsteams eng zusammenarbeiten, um Sicherheitsrichtlinien zu definieren, umzusetzen und zu pflegen, einschließlich URL-Filterung, Cloud-Anwendung und Dateifilterung, DLP und Zugriffskontrolle.

- Konfigurieren, bedienen und pflegen Zscaler-Lösungen (ZIA, ZPA) und verwandte Komponenten wie SIPA, Cloud Firewall, PAC-Dateien, NSS, ZCC...

- Verwalten Sie Unternehmensgeräte mit Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), um eine sichere und zuverlässige Vernetzung zu gewährleisten.

- Fehlerbehebung und Lösung von Zscaler-bezogenen Problemen durch die Analyse von Protokollen, die Durchführung von Spuren und die Anwendung geeigneter Korrekturmaßnahmen.

- Analyse von Netzwerkpaket-Tracks (PCAP), Fiddler-Logs und HTTP/HTTPS-Headern, um komplexe Konnektivitäts- und Leistungsprobleme zu identifizieren und zu lösen.

- Proaktiv vorschlagen und implementieren Verbesserungen der Netzwerk- und Proxyleistung, Kapazität, Skalierbarkeit und Sicherheitshaltung.

3. Network Engineering & Operations

- Bereitstellung technischer Unterstützung für Netzwerk- und verbundene Dienstleistungen auf der 2. und 3. Ebene.

- Konfigurieren, installieren und pflegen Netzwerkgeräte und -dienste (z.B. Router, Switche, Firewalls, Load Balancer, VPN, QoS).

- Unterstützung und Aufrechterhaltung der Netzwerkverbindung für Finanzmarktdatenfeeds und andere latenzempfindliche Dienste.

- Umsetzung und Aufrechterhaltung eines kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsprozesses durch Definition, Dokumentation und Durchsetzung von Netzwerk- und Proxystandards, Verfahren und Best Practices.

- Schnittstelle zu externen Anbietern und Partnern (Integratoren, Telekommunikationsanbietern, Marktdatenanbietern usw.), um Netzwerklösungen zu entwickeln, umzusetzen und zu unterstützen.

- Nehmen Sie an 24x7 on-call / on-duty Rotation (Piquet) teil, um kritische Infrastruktur zu unterstützen.

- Überwachen Sie die Netzwerk- und Proxyleistung und gewährleisten Sie die Systemverfügbarkeit, Zuverlässigkeit und Sicherheit.

- Überwachen Sie die Ressourcennutzung, Trends und Kapazitäten des Systems und planen Sie Upgrades oder Optimierungen entsprechend.

Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen

Hintergrund

- 6–10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Vernetzung in komplexen, internationalen Umgebungen.

- Starkes Wissen über Unternehmensnetzwerkarchitektur und Netzwerksicherheit.

- Berufserfahrung mit Cisco-Technologien und Cisco ACI; Finanzdienstleistungen Erfahrung ist ein Plus.

Technische Fähigkeiten

- Experte für LAN/WAN/MAN Implementierung und Fehlersuche.

- Starke Erfahrung mit Firewalls (Fortinet und/oder Check Point), VPN, IPSec und GRE Tunnels.

- Bewährtes Know-how mit Zscaler ZIA/ZPA und ZCC auf Unternehmensgeräten.

- Solides Verständnis von Netzwerk- und Cloud-Konnektivitätsdesign.

- Fähigkeit, Netzwerkspuren (PCAP), Fiddler-Logs und HTTP/HTTPS-Header zu analysieren.

- Kenntnis von Python oder einer anderen Skriptsprache für die Automatisierung; Zscaler Zertifizierung ist ein Plus.

Soft Skills & Sprachen

- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten; in der Lage, effektiv mit technischen und nicht technischen Akteuren zu arbeiten.

- Erleben Sie die Verwaltung von Drittanbietern und internen Support-Teams.

- Rigorous, autonom, proaktiv und serviceorientiert, mit starken Dokumentationsfähigkeiten.

- Flöten in Französisch und Englisch, geschrieben und gesprochen.

Unsere Werte

- Rechenschaftspflicht: Eigentum an Aufgaben und Herausforderungen zu nehmen, sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung zu suchen.

- Hands-on: Als proaktiv, schnell qualitativ hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern.

- Leidenschaftlich: Sein Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz.

- Lösungsgetrieben: Konzentrieren Sie sich auf Client-Ergebnisse und Behandlung von Kunden ziemlich mit einem risikobewussten Mindset.

- Partnerschaftsorientiert: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit; Zusammenarbeit mit Unternehmergeist.

Anwendung

- Bitte stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie bei der Einreichung Ihrer Bewerbung einen Brief an Ihren Lebenslauf richten.

- Wenn Sie sich für diese Position bewerben möchten, nutzen Sie bitte den angegebenen Anwendungslink.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Informations générales - Département: Technologie de l'information – Infrastructure - Temps de travail Pourcentage: 100% - Lieu: Genève Notre société EFG International est un groupe bancaire privé mondial qui offre des services de banque privée et de gestion d'actifs. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 endroits dans le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. Notre but et notre mission Donner aux esprits entrepreneurs les moyens de créer de la valeur – aujourd'hui et pour l'avenir. Description de l'emploi Rôle et équipe Au sein du Département des technologies de l'information, vous rejoindrez une équipe de 12 ingénieurs basés à Genève et collaborerez avec des collègues en TI dans plus de 30 pays. Sous la supervision du gestionnaire du soutien à l'infrastructure informatique, vous dirigerez une équipe de trois ingénieurs du réseau. Vous combinerez la gestion des personnes et l'ingénierie pratique, en veillant à ce que les systèmes critiques d'EFG restent sécurisés, résistants et toujours connectés dans un environnement bancaire privé exigeant. 1. Leadership et gestion - Diriger, encadrer et développer une équipe de trois ingénieurs de réseau, favorisant une culture de responsabilisation, de collaboration et d'amélioration continue. - Combiner le leadership d'équipe et le travail technique pratique sur des incidents et des projets complexes. - Surveiller les opérations quotidiennes de réseau et de procuration, y compris la gestion des incidents, des problèmes et du changement. - Planifier et coordonner les mises à niveau, les migrations et les activités liées au cycle de vie des réseaux et des mandataires conformément aux exigences des entreprises et de la sécurité. - Gérer les escalades, assurer la résolution rapide des incidents majeurs et une communication claire avec les parties prenantes. - Gérer et examiner les fournisseurs tiers et les contrats de fournisseurs, en assurant la qualité du service, la rentabilité et le respect des ALS. - Veiller au respect des politiques internes ainsi que des exigences réglementaires, de sécurité et de vérification applicables aux réseaux et aux infrastructures de sécurité. 2. Poxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler) - Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes de sécurité pour définir, mettre en œuvre et maintenir les politiques de sécurité, y compris le filtrage d'URL, application cloud et filtrage de fichiers, DLP et contrôle d'accès. - Configurer, exploiter et entretenir les solutions Zscaler (ZIA, ZPA) et les composants connexes tels que SIPA, pare-feu cloud, fichiers PAC, NSS, ZCC... - Gérer les périphériques d'entreprise en utilisant Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), assurant une connectivité sécurisée et fiable. - Dépanner et résoudre les problèmes liés au Zscaler en analysant les journaux, en effectuant des traces et en appliquant des mesures correctives appropriées. - Analyser les traces de paquets réseau (PCAP), les journaux Fiddler et les en-têtes HTTP/HTTPS pour identifier et résoudre des problèmes complexes de connectivité et de performance. - Proposer et mettre en œuvre des améliorations proactives aux performances, aux capacités, à l'évolutivité et à la posture de sécurité des réseaux et des mandataires. 3. Génie et opérations du réseau - Fournir un soutien technique de deuxième et troisième niveaux pour les services de réseau et les services connexes. - Configurer, installer et entretenir des périphériques et services réseau (par exemple routeurs, commutateurs, pare-feu, balanceurs de charge, VPN, QoS). - Soutenir et maintenir la connectivité réseau pour les flux de données des marchés financiers et d'autres services sensibles à la latence. - Mettre en oeuvre et maintenir un processus d'amélioration continue en définissant, documentant et appliquant les normes, procédures et pratiques exemplaires en matière de réseaux et de procurations. - Interface avec des fournisseurs et partenaires externes (intégrateurs, fournisseurs de télécommunications, fournisseurs de données du marché, etc.) pour concevoir, mettre en œuvre et soutenir des solutions réseau. - Participer à la rotation 24x7 sur appel/en service (piquet) pour soutenir les infrastructures essentielles. - Surveiller les performances du réseau et du mandataire, en assurant la disponibilité, la fiabilité et la sécurité du système. - Surveiller l'utilisation des ressources du système, les tendances et les capacités, et planifier les mises à niveau ou les optimisations en conséquence. Compétences et expérience Contexte - 6-10 ans d'expérience en réseautage dans des environnements complexes et internationaux. - Forte connaissance de l'architecture de réseau d'entreprise et de la sécurité des réseaux. - Expérience professionnelle avec les technologies Cisco et Cisco ACI; l'expérience des services financiers est un atout. Compétences techniques - Expert en implémentation et dépannage LAN/WAN/MAN. - Forte expérience avec les pare-feu (Fortinet et/ou Check Point), VPN, IPSec et les tunnels GRE. - Expertise éprouvée avec Zscaler ZIA/ZPA et ZCC sur les appareils d'entreprise. - Une bonne compréhension de la conception de la connectivité réseau et cloud. - Possibilité d'analyser les traces réseau (PCAP), les journaux Fiddler et les en-têtes HTTP/HTTPS. - Connaissance de Python ou d'un autre langage de script pour l'automatisation ; la certification Zscaler est un plus. Compétences et langues douces - Compétences solides en communication; capacité de travailler efficacement avec les intervenants techniques et non techniques. - Expérience en gestion de fournisseurs tiers et d'équipes de soutien internes. - Rigieuse, autonome, proactive et axée sur le service, avec de solides compétences en documentation. - Fluent en français et anglais, écrit et parlé. Nos valeurs - Responsabilisation : Prendre en main les tâches et les défis, et chercher une amélioration continue. - Hands-on: être proactif pour obtenir rapidement des résultats de haute qualité. - Passionné : être engagé et viser l'excellence. - La solution est axée sur les résultats des clients et le traitement équitable des clients avec un état d'esprit conscient des risques. - Objectif partenariat : promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe; travailler ensemble dans un esprit d'entreprise. Demande - Veuillez joindre une lettre d'accompagnement à votre CV au moment de soumettre votre demande. - Oui. Si vous désirez postuler à ce poste, veuillez utiliser le lien de demande désigné.

summary:
General Information

  • Department: Information Technology – Infrastructure
  • Work Time Percentage: 100%
  • Location: Geneva

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

Role and Team

Within the Information Technology Department, you will join a team of 12 engineers based in Geneva and collaborate with IT colleagues in more than 30 countries. Under the supervision of the IT Infrastructure Support Manager, you will lead a team of three network engineers.

You will combine people management with hands-on engineering, ensuring that EFG’s business-critical systems remain secure, resilient, and always connected in a demanding private banking environment.

Main Responsibilities

1. Leadership & Management

  • Lead, coach and develop a team of three network engineers, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration and continuous improvement.
  • Combine team leadership with hands-on technical work on complex incidents and projects.
  • Oversee day-to-day network and proxy operations, including incident, problem and change management.
  • Plan and coordinate network and proxy upgrades, migrations and lifecycle activities in alignment with business and security requirements.
  • Manage escalations, ensuring timely resolution of major incidents and clear communication with stakeholders.
  • Manage and review third-party providers and vendor contracts, ensuring service quality, cost effectiveness and adherence to SLAs.
  • Ensure compliance with internal policies as well as regulatory, security and audit requirements relevant to network and security infrastructure.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

  • Collaborate closely with security teams to define, implement and maintain security policies, including URL filtering, cloud application and file filtering, DLP and access control.
  • Configure, operate and maintain Zscaler solutions (ZIA, ZPA) and related components such as SIPA, cloud firewall, PAC files, NSS, ZCC...
  • Manage corporate devices using Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), ensuring secure and reliable connectivity.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve Zscaler-related issues by analysing logs, performing traces and applying appropriate corrective actions.
  • Analyse network packet traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers to identify and resolve complex connectivity and performance issues.
  • Proactively suggest and implement improvements to network and proxy performance, capacity, scalability and security posture.

3. Network Engineering & Operations

  • Provide 2nd and 3rd level technical support for network and related services.
  • Configure, install and maintain network devices and services (e.g. routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, VPN, QoS).
  • Support and maintain network connectivity for financial market data feeds and other latency-sensitive services.
  • Implement and maintain a continuous improvement process by defining, documenting and enforcing network and proxy standards, procedures and best practices.
  • Interface with external suppliers and partners (integrators, telecom providers, market data vendors, etc.) to design, implement and support network solutions.
  • Participate in 24x7 on-call / on-duty rotation (piquet) to support critical infrastructure.
  • Monitor network and proxy performance, ensuring system availability, reliability and security.
  • Monitor system resource utilisation, trends and capacity, and plan upgrades or optimisations accordingly.

Skills and Experience

Background

  • 6–10 years of experience in networking in complex, international environments.
  • Strong knowledge of enterprise networking architecture and network security.
  • Professional experience with Cisco technologies and Cisco ACI; financial services experience is a plus.

Technical Skills

  • Expert in LAN/WAN/MAN implementation and troubleshooting.
  • Strong experience with firewalls (Fortinet and/or Check Point), VPN, IPSec and GRE tunnels.
  • Proven expertise with Zscaler ZIA/ZPA and ZCC on corporate devices.
  • Solid understanding of network and cloud connectivity design.
  • Ability to analyse network traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers.
  • Knowledge of Python or another scripting language for automation; Zscaler certification is a plus.

Soft Skills & Languages

  • Strong communication skills; able to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Experience managing third-party providers and internal support teams.
  • Rigorous, autonomous, proactive and service-oriented, with strong documentation skills.
  • Fluent in French and English, written and spoken.

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.
  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.
  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.
  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.
  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Application

  1. Please ensure you attach a cover letter to your CV when submitting your application.
  2. Should you wish to apply for this position, please use the designated application link.

jobs.title: IT Trading & Treasury Solutions Specialist
jobs.description:
## General Info

- Department: IT Trading

- Work time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Lugano

## Job Description

The IT Treasury and Trading team delivers efficient, effective support and IT solutions for applications and processes in client order execution, trading, treasury, and lending/collateral management. The team comprises both functional and technical experts supporting a Trading/Treasury room of approximately 50 traders. This role ensures continuity in client services and drives ongoing improvements in deliverable quality.

## Main responsibilities

- Run the Bank: end-to-end support on the IT trading platforms used for Securities Lending & Collateral, Islamic Finance, Securities and Derivatives execution and trading, spanning from application maintenance to analysis and resolution on daily incidents, liaising with external vendors where applicable.

- Run the Bank: act as entry point to trading desk for broader issues that require liaising with other IT departments to cover the full stack (core banking and other linked applications, IT infa server, database, network, …) or with Operations teams (Securities, Derivatives, FX back office, middle office)

- Change the Bank: coordinate and execute various IT projects aimed at evolving or upgrading the IT trading platforms, either developed and released internally or by application providers: collection of business needs, solution design and documentation, development where applicable and/or vendor coordination, creation of test cases catalogue and execution of IT tests, support to user acceptance test, rollout and post production support

- Change the Bank: development of departmental applications aimed at covering gaps of the existing IT applications, mainly in the area of system integration and reporting

- Change the Bank: management of tools for the automation of health checks on trading IT platforms to eventually guarantee the service to internal clients

## Skills and experience

- A university degree, preferably in computer science, finance or an equivalent educational background

- Very good knowledge of programming languages (Java; Pyton; C++, SQL, Powershell, …), application server (Windows mainly, Linux) and database systems (Oracle, MS SQL)

- Good knowledge of financial products (Forex, Securities, Derivatives, Sec Lending) and main bank processes (order/execution on the market of the plain vanilla products)

- Very good analytic skill, tech curiosity, proactivity in identifying the best tech solution to a business need

- Capability to work under constant pressure

- Flexibility (request to work by shift; during bank-holiday or Saturday)

- Capability to integrate in a wider IT team and good team player

- Good communication skills (Italian-English are a must, French is a plus)

## Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

Informazioni generali
- Dipartimento: IT Trading
- Tempo di lavoro Percentuale: 100%
- Ubicazione: Lugano

## La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo di private banking globale, che offre servizi di private banking e asset management. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si sforza di essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. EFG si impegna a fornire un ambiente di lavoro equo e inclusivo fondato sul principio del rispetto reciproco. Unire il nostro team significa sperimentare un ambiente di supporto, dove i vostri contributi sono valutati e riconosciuti. Crediamo fermamente che la diversità dei nostri team ci dia un vantaggio competitivo favorendo un migliore processo decisionale e una maggiore innovazione.

## Il nostro scopo e la nostra missione alimentano le menti imprenditoriali per creare valore – oggi e per il futuro. Siamo una banca privata, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate su scala globale a clienti privati e istituzionali. Il nostro successo sostenibile si basa sui nostri talenti e su come collaboriamo con i nostri clienti e comunità per creare valore duraturo.

## Job Description Il team IT Treasury and Trading offre soluzioni IT efficienti, efficaci e di supporto per applicazioni e processi nell'esecuzione di ordini client, trading, tesoreria e gestione dei prestiti/collaterali. Il team comprende sia esperti funzionali che tecnici che sostengono una sala Trading/Treasury di circa 50 operatori. Questo ruolo garantisce continuità nei servizi client e migliora costantemente la qualità.

## Principali responsabilitÃ
- Eseguire la Banca: supporto end-to-end sulle piattaforme di trading IT utilizzate per le operazioni di prestito e collaterale, finanza islamica, esecuzione e trading di titoli e derivati, che spaziano dalla manutenzione delle applicazioni all'analisi e alla risoluzione sugli incidenti quotidiani, legandosi con fornitori esterni dove applicabile.
- Eseguire la Banca: agire come punto di accesso al banco di trading per questioni più ampie che richiedono l'accesso ad altri servizi IT per coprire l'intero stack (core banking e altre applicazioni collegate, IT infa server, database, rete, ...) o con i team di Operations (Securities, Derivatives, FX back office, middle office)
- Cambiare la banca: coordinare ed eseguire vari progetti IT volti a evolvere o aggiornare le piattaforme di trading IT Prendere la proprietà per compiti e sfide, così come la ricerca di un miglioramento continuo
- Hands-on: Essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Passionate: Essere impegnati e impegnati per l'eccellenza
- Soluzione-driven: Focusing sui risultati dei clienti e trattare i clienti abbastanza con una mentalità di rischio-consapevole
- Partnership-oriented: Promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme a uno spirito imprenditoriale.

## Assicurarsi di allegare una lettera di copertura al CV durante la compilazione dell'applicazione.

## Applicazione Se si desidera richiedere per questa posizione utilizzare questo link per applicare.

Allgemeines Info
- Department: IT Trading
